$schema: Deep biography schema for billionaire profiles on 부자사주 — BATCH 2 (Bilingual EN/KO)
$instructions: For each billionaire listed below, research and fill in as many fields as possible. Use Wikipedia, Forbes, Bloomberg, and reliable news sources. IMPORTANT: Every text field must have BOTH English AND Korean versions. English fields keep their original names; Korean fields add a 'Ko' suffix (e.g., 'earlyLife' for English, 'earlyLifeKo' for Korean). Korean text should be natural, fluent Korean — not machine-translated. Save each file in scripts/deep-bios/ with the naming convention shown below.

childhood.familyBackground: Father was a Swiss immigrant who worked as a manager at Ford Motor Company...
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 아버지는 포드 자동차에서 관리자로 일한 스위스 이민자...
childhood.education: Attended Detroit Country Day School, graduated from Harvard University magna cum laude...
childhood.educationKo: 디트로이트 컨트리 데이 스쿨을 졸업하고 하버드 대학교를 마그나 쿰 라우데로 졸업...
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in a middle-class family in the Detroit suburb of Farmington Hills...
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 디트로이트 교외 파밍턴 힐스의 중산층 가정에서 성장...

careerTimeline.event: Joined Microsoft as its 30th employee and first business manager
careerTimeline.eventKo: 마이크로소프트의 30번째 직원이자 첫 비즈니스 매니저로 입사

careerTimeline.event: Became CEO of Microsoft, succeeding Bill Gates
careerTimeline.eventKo: 빌 게이츠의 뒤를 이어 마이크로소프트 CEO 취임

failures.description: Description of the failure or setback in English
failures.lesson: What they learned or how they recovered
failures.lessonKo: 배운 점이나 극복 과정에 대한 한국어 설명

quotes.contextKo: 언제/왜 이 말을 했는지 한국어 설명

authored.title: Book title or null if none

personalTraits.knownFor: What they are most known for in English
personalTraits.knownForKo: 이 인물이 가장 잘 알려진 특징 (한국어)

sajuConnection.note: This field will be written by us. Leave null.

outputFormat: Save as individual JSON files in scripts/deep-bios/ following the file names in the targetList above. One file per person. Each file must have the 'id' field matching the id shown in the targetList.
qualityGuidelines: BILINGUAL: Every text field MUST have both English AND Korean versions. Add 'Ko' suffix for Korean fields.
Korean text should be natural, fluent Korean — NOT literal machine translation. Write as if for a Korean audience.
Include at least 5-8 career timeline events per person
Include at least 2-3 failures/setbacks per person (every billionaire has had them)
Include at least 5 data points in wealthHistory spanning their career (use Forbes/Bloomberg historical data)
Include at least 3 notable quotes with proper attribution
For books: check if they authored any books AND list books they've publicly recommended
personalTraits.knownFor should be 2-3 sentences, specific and vivid, not generic
For less-documented billionaires (heirs, private figures), still fill what you can and mark unknowns as null
All monetary values in wealthHistory are in billions USD
Cite sources for each section — this helps us verify accuracy
